title: Cannot login to customer portal
description: User unable to login to the customer portal. Gets error 'Invalid credentials' even after password reset. Has tried Chrome and Firefox. Cleared cache and cookies. Issue started after the forced MFA rollout yesterday.
rootCause: Account locked after 5 failed MFA attempts during rollout
resolutionNotes: Account was locked due to 5 failed attempts. Unlocked account via admin panel and reset MFA token. Asked user to use incognito mode for first login after reset.
internalNotes: Likely to recur for other users post-MFA rollout. Consider proactive comms.

title: Invoice shows wrong amount — $650 overcharge
description: Customer received invoice #INV-4821 for $2,450 but the agreed contract price is $1,800. The difference of $650 appears to be an additional line item for 'Premium Support' which was not part of the signed agreement dated Jan 2024.
rootCause: Premium Support SKU incorrectly added during contract renewal process
resolutionNotes: Verified contract terms. Premium Support added in error during renewal. Issued credit note CN-2024-089 for $650. Updated billing profile to exclude premium support tier.
internalNotes: Renewal team needs retraining on SKU selection. Filed internal process ticket.

title: API rate limit halved after platform update
description: Our integration is hitting rate limits at 500 req/min but our Enterprise plan allows 1000 req/min. Started after platform update on March 14th. Production system is affected — automated jobs are failing and retrying, causing cascading delays.
rootCause: Platform update v3.2.1 introduced off-by-one error in rate limit configuration multiplier
resolutionNotes: Hotfix deployed at 10:20 AM UTC restoring rate limits to 1000 req/min. Customer compensated with 1 month credit ($299). Post-mortem scheduled.
internalNotes: Regression test coverage for rate limits needs improvement. Added to Q2 tech debt backlog.

title: Analytics dashboard 45-second load time
description: Main analytics dashboard takes 45-60 seconds to load for all users in the organisation. Previously loaded in under 3 seconds. No configuration changes made on our end. Started approximately 3 days ago. Affects daily reporting workflows significantly.
rootCause: Missing composite index on account_id + date_range introduced in v3.2.1 database migration
resolutionNotes: Deployed query optimisation patch. Dashboard load time back to under 2 seconds. Root cause: missing index on account_id + date_range composite in analytics_events table.
internalNotes: DB migration review process should include query plan analysis for large accounts.

title: Okta SSO redirect loop — SAML audience mismatch
description: SAML SSO with Okta stopped working after we updated our Okta application configuration. Users get redirected to login page in an infinite loop. Error in browser console: SAML assertion validation failed — audience mismatch. All 300 employees affected.
rootCause: Okta SP Entity ID was using legacy URL format, mismatching updated SP metadata
resolutionNotes: Updated SP Entity ID in customer Okta app from legacy URL to new format. Tested with 3 user accounts across different roles. SSO working correctly across all browsers.
internalNotes: SSO migration guide needs updating to include Entity ID format change. Added to docs backlog.

title: CSV export capped at 10,000 rows — missing 35,000 records
description: CSV export of customer records only shows 10,000 rows but we have 45,000 customers in the system. Export settings clearly show 'All records' is selected. This is blocking our quarterly reporting submission due Friday.
rootCause: Synchronous export endpoint has undocumented 10k row limit for memory safety
resolutionNotes: Enabled async bulk export for accounts with over 10k records. Customer received full 45k record export via secure email link within 15 minutes. Documentation and UI updated to show async option.
internalNotes: Export limit was never communicated in UI. UX ticket filed to show limit warning and async option proactively.

title: Duplicate subscription charge on March renewal
description: Account was charged twice for the March subscription renewal. Both charges of $599 appear on the credit card statement dated March 1st. Charge IDs: CHG-88291 and CHG-88304. Bank is asking for documentation.
rootCause: Payment gateway timeout on first attempt triggered silent retry, both attempts succeeded
resolutionNotes: Confirmed duplicate charge due to payment gateway timeout. Initiated refund for CHG-88304 ($599) — 3-5 business days. Added $50 account credit as goodwill. Sent refund confirmation with transaction IDs for bank.
internalNotes: Payment gateway retry logic needs idempotency key implementation. Engineering ticket raised.

title: Team not receiving any email notifications
description: Users stopped receiving all email notifications — task assignments, mentions, and alerts — since last Tuesday. Checked spam folders across multiple users, nothing there. Other emails from our domain arrive fine. Affects entire team of 25 users.
rootCause: Domain agency.com accidentally added to global suppression list during spam cleanup job
resolutionNotes: Removed agency.com from email suppression list. Email delivery confirmed restored for all 25 users. Implemented manual approval gate for bulk domain suppression operations.
internalNotes: Suppression list cleanup job needs domain-level audit before running. Added safeguard PR to backlog.

title: All 150 users locked out — possible security incident
description: All 150 users in our organisation received a forced password reset email simultaneously and are now locked out. We did not initiate this. Suspect possible account compromise or internal security incident. Need urgent access restoration and security audit.
internalNotes: Needs immediate triage — potential security breach. Escalate to security team.

title: All invoices showing USD instead of GBP
description: All invoices generated this month are displaying amounts in USD but our account is configured for GBP billing. Started after the billing system upgrade last week. Affects all 12 invoices for March. Customers are confused and flagging incorrect amounts.
internalNotes: Likely related to billing system upgrade — check currency locale migration script.

title: Webhook payloads not reaching our endpoint
description: Webhook endpoint stopped receiving payloads 6 hours ago. Our endpoint is healthy and returning HTTP 200 on manual test. Webhook dashboard shows all events as 'Delivered' but our server access logs show zero incoming requests in the same period.
internalNotes: Webhook delivery status showing success but no actual delivery — possible DNS or proxy issue on delivery worker.

title: 504 Gateway Timeout on reports over 90-day range
description: Generating reports with date ranges exceeding 90 days results in a 504 Gateway Timeout every time. Works fine for 30 or 60-day ranges. We require 12-month reports for an annual compliance audit due next week.
internalNotes: Likely hitting gateway timeout threshold. Needs async report generation like bulk export.

title: iOS 17.4 update causes immediate app crash on launch
description: Since upgrading to iOS 17.4, the mobile app crashes immediately on launch before the login screen appears. Affects all iOS users in the organisation (approximately 80 people). Android users on the same version are unaffected.
internalNotes: iOS 17.4 introduced breaking change in UIKit lifecycle. Engineering investigating with crash logs.

title: Seat limit error despite being under plan limit
description: Getting 'Seat limit reached' error when trying to add new users but we only have 18 active users and our Business plan allows 25 seats. Tried deactivating and reactivating a user — same error persists. Need to onboard 3 new hires starting today.
internalNotes: Possible stale seat count cache — check billing service seat aggregation job.

title: Global search returning cross-account results
description: Global search is returning records from completely different companies. Searching for a customer name returns contacts from unrelated organisations. This is a potential data privacy issue. Started after last night's search index rebuild.
internalNotes: URGENT — potential cross-tenant data exposure. Search index rebuild may have dropped tenant_id scoping. Disable search until fixed.

title: 2FA codes rejected for subset of users
description: 10 out of approximately 200 users are having TOTP 2FA codes rejected even when entered correctly and promptly. Device time is synced via NTP on all affected machines. Pattern unclear — affects both iOS and Android authenticator apps.
internalNotes: Possible TOTP clock skew tolerance issue — check if affected users enrolled during a specific window.

title: 5,000-row CSV bulk import completes but saves no data
description: CSV import of 5,000 product records fails silently — upload progress bar reaches 100% and shows success message, but zero records appear in the product catalogue. File format verified against the provided template. Tried 3 times with same result.
internalNotes: Import job likely failing at DB write stage with swallowed exception. Need to check import worker logs.

title: Downgrade to Professional plan still billing Enterprise rate
description: Downgraded from Enterprise ($899/mo) to Professional ($299/mo) plan 2 weeks ago. Account settings confirm the downgrade as completed. However, both subsequent invoices have been charged at the old Enterprise rate of $899. Total overcharge so far: $1,200.
internalNotes: Downgrade confirmation may not have propagated to billing service. Check plan sync between account service and Stripe.

title: 72-hour gap in audit logs — compliance audit at risk
description: Audit log is completely missing all user activity entries for Feb 28 – March 2 (exactly 72 hours). We have a mandatory compliance audit next week and regulators require a complete activity trail. Gap coincides with our scheduled maintenance window.
internalNotes: Audit log writer was paused during maintenance and resume job may have failed silently. Check archive storage for buffered events.

title: Custom domain SSL certificate expired — customers seeing security warnings
description: Our custom domain is showing SSL certificate expired errors. Certificate expired yesterday. All customers visiting our portal see browser security warnings and are refusing to proceed. Causing significant revenue impact — estimated $5k/hour in lost conversions.
internalNotes: Auto-renewal job failed silently 30 days ago. Certificate renewal in progress. ETA 30 mins. Consider interim redirect to main domain.
